title: Remove deprecated field ContainerState.NetworkStatusOld
body:
The field `ContainerState.NetworkStatusOld` drags in a dependency on CNI and thereby blocks us from disabling CNI support via a build tag

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
